summary: Backend testing for Daily Missions (GPS + Photo). Wrote 13 pytest cases covering auth, CRUD, XP awards (+10 new, +40 converted, +30 patch delta), photo upload + 1.5MB limit (413), google_maps_url auto-gen, cross-user data isolation, challenge auto-increment (prospects goal), and index verification. 12/13 passing. Sole failure: missions collection has NO indexes defined in seed_admin_and_indexes — spec requires mission_id unique + (user_id, created_at) compound.

minor.issue: Missions collection has no indexes. Spec requires unique index on mission_id and compound index on (user_id, created_at). Currently only default _id_ exists — will hurt scale + allow duplicate mission_id on races.

action_items: Add missions indexes in seed_admin_and_indexes(): await db.missions.create_index('mission_id', unique=True); await db.missions.create_index([('user_id', 1), ('created_at', -1)])
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1388 lines — should be split into routers (missions, challenges, teams, auth, reports) for maintainability.
MissionUpdate model does not allow updating lat/lng/photo_data — intentional? If field-agent needs to correct a photo/location, they cannot via PATCH.
MAX_PHOTO_BYTES is measured against base64 string length (~1.5MB base64 ≈ ~1.1MB binary). Docstring in error says 'max ~1MB' — mismatched with the constant name. Consider clarifying UX text.
No pagination cursor on GET /api/missions (only limit). Fine for MVP but flag for scale.
PATCH does not update google_maps_url even if lat/lng were to be added later — currently OK because MissionUpdate doesn't accept them.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed missions and one TEST_ProspectsChallenge_* per run; missions self-cleaned by isolation/delete tests where feasible. Residual test challenges may accumulate — consider a cleanup fixture in future.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_missions.py fully green once indexes are added. Re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_missions.py -v -o addopts=''. The challenge-progress test relies on GET /api/challenges returning top-level 'progress' key (not 'my_progress').
rca of the issue: seed_admin_and_indexes (server.py ~L1245) creates indexes for users/checkins/prospects/followups/attendance/challenges/xp_events/teams/user_sessions but omits the missions collection entirely. Fix: add two create_index calls for missions inside the same function.
